Solution 01

Firewall Solutions

Advanced firewall and network security solutions to defend against modern cyber threats, with unified management and deep packet inspection across your entire network.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

CH
Check Point Next-Gen Firewall
＋ View details
CH

Check Point

Next-Gen Firewall

Check Point delivers industry-leading next-generation firewalls with Infinity architecture, offering unified threat prevention across network, cloud, and mobile environments.

Key Features

  • AI-powered threat prevention engine
  • Unified security management console
  • Zero-day sandboxing with SandBlast
  • Scalable from SMB to hyperscale
  • Full SSL/TLS inspection

Use Cases

  • ✓ Block ransomware and zero-day exploits at the perimeter
  • ✓ Manage policies across hundreds of branches from one console
  • ✓ Inspect encrypted traffic without performance degradation
Why CrewTEC recommends Check Point

Check Point consistently ranks as a Gartner Magic Quadrant leader. CrewTEC is a certified Check Point partner with deployment expertise across enterprise and government networks in India.

Interested in Check Point? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Check Point →
AL
AlgoSec Security Policy Mgmt
＋ View details
AL

AlgoSec

Security Policy Mgmt

AlgoSec automates security policy management across complex, multi-vendor firewall environments -- reducing risk, ensuring compliance, and accelerating change processes.

Key Features

  • Automated firewall rule cleanup and optimisation
  • Application connectivity mapping
  • Risk-aware change management workflow
  • Multi-vendor support (Check Point, Palo Alto, Cisco, etc.)
  • Continuous compliance reporting

Use Cases

  • ✓ Clean up thousands of redundant firewall rules safely
  • ✓ Prove compliance for PCI-DSS and ISO 27001 audits
  • ✓ Automatically push firewall changes with zero errors
Why CrewTEC recommends AlgoSec

AlgoSec transforms firewall management from a manual bottleneck to an automated process. CrewTEC deploys AlgoSec alongside your existing firewalls for immediate ROI.

Interested in AlgoSec? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for AlgoSec →
AK
Akamai Cloud Firewall / CDN
＋ View details
AK

Akamai

Cloud Firewall / CDN

Akamai protects web applications and APIs at the edge with its globally distributed platform -- combining WAF, DDoS mitigation, bot management, and CDN in one solution.

Key Features

  • Edge-based WAF with OWASP rule sets
  • Prolexic DDoS scrubbing centres
  • Bot Manager for credential stuffing prevention
  • API Security for REST/GraphQL APIs
  • Global CDN for performance

Use Cases

  • ✓ Absorb multi-terabit DDoS attacks before they reach your origin
  • ✓ Protect public-facing APIs from abuse and scraping
  • ✓ Accelerate web performance while enforcing security
Why CrewTEC recommends Akamai

Akamai operates the world's largest edge network. CrewTEC helps Indian enterprises configure and tune Akamai's platform for both performance and security outcomes.

Interested in Akamai? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Akamai →
IM
Imperva WAF & DDoS Protection
＋ View details
IM

Imperva

WAF & DDoS Protection

Imperva provides data and application security through its cloud WAF, DDoS protection, and database activity monitoring -- defending against the most sophisticated attacks.

Key Features

  • Cloud WAF with virtual patching
  • Advanced bot protection
  • DDoS protection with sub-3-second mitigation
  • Database activity monitoring (DAM)
  • API discovery and protection

Use Cases

  • ✓ Virtually patch web vulnerabilities without code changes
  • ✓ Stop account takeover attacks using bot detection
  • ✓ Monitor and audit all database access in real time
Why CrewTEC recommends Imperva

Imperva excels in protecting both applications and the data behind them. CrewTEC combines Imperva WAF with DAM for a complete application-to-database security layer.

Interested in Imperva? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Imperva →
CL
Cloudflare Zero Trust Network
＋ View details
CL

Cloudflare

Zero Trust Network

Cloudflare's global network delivers firewall, DDoS protection, Zero Trust access, and secure DNS -- all from a single unified platform used by millions worldwide.

Key Features

  • Magic Firewall for network-level filtering
  • Magic Transit for DDoS protection
  • DNS firewall and secure DNS resolution
  • Gateway for secure web and DNS filtering
  • R2 and Workers for edge compute security

Use Cases

  • ✓ Replace on-premise firewall hardware with cloud-native protection
  • ✓ Filter malicious DNS queries before they reach your network
  • ✓ Protect entire IP ranges from volumetric DDoS attacks
Why CrewTEC recommends Cloudflare

Cloudflare's simplicity and global reach make it ideal for enterprises of all sizes. CrewTEC manages Cloudflare onboarding, configuration, and ongoing policy management.

Interested in Cloudflare? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Cloudflare →
FO
Forcepoint Human-Centric Security
＋ View details
FO

Forcepoint

Human-Centric Security

Forcepoint's Next-Gen Firewall focuses on understanding human behaviour, offering deep application visibility, SD-WAN capabilities, and centralised management across distributed sites.

Key Features

  • Application-layer inspection with 1800+ app signatures
  • Built-in SD-WAN for branch connectivity
  • Centralised management for multi-site deployments
  • Behavioural analytics integration
  • High-availability active-active clustering

Use Cases

  • ✓ Secure and connect branch offices with integrated SD-WAN
  • ✓ Gain application-level visibility beyond port-based rules
  • ✓ Enforce consistent policies across geographically distributed sites
Why CrewTEC recommends Forcepoint

Forcepoint's human-centric approach aligns with insider threat programmes. CrewTEC deploys Forcepoint NGFW for organisations needing both connectivity and security in one platform.

Interested in Forcepoint? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Forcepoint →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Block advanced persistent threats and zero-day attacks
  • ✓ Centrally manage security policies across distributed networks
  • ✓ Protect web applications from OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities
  • ✓ Defend against volumetric and application-layer DDoS attacks
  • ✓ Achieve compliance with PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, and GDPR

Key Features

Deep packet inspection and SSL/TLS decryption

Centralised policy management across all locations

Real-time threat intelligence integration

Application-layer visibility and control

High-availability clustering and failover
